title: Backup & System Recovery
description: Manage safe protection of critical data and rapid recovery in emergencies.

settings.autoBackupDesc: Automatically backs up the system at scheduled intervals.
settings.scheduleTimeDesc: Performs a full backup at the scheduled time every day.
settings.retentionDesc: Backups older than the retention period will be automatically deleted.
settings.includeLogsDesc: When enabled, system event logs are also backed up along with the DB.

restore.title: Feature Coming Soon
restore.desc: External backup file upload and point-in-time recovery (PITR) features will be available in the next update.

modal.title: Create New Backup
modal.descPlaceholder: Enter reason or notes for this backup.
modal.infoMsg: Creates a complete snapshot of the current system database.

confirm.saveMsg: Are you sure you want to save the modified backup settings?
confirm.saveDoneMsg: Backup settings have been successfully saved.
confirm.backupMsg: Are you sure you want to instantly backup the current database state? This may take some time depending on data size.
confirm.deleteMsg: Are you sure you want to delete this backup file? Both the file and DB record will be permanently removed.
confirm.restoreMsg: Are you sure you want to restore the system to the [{{name}}] backup point? The current database will be replaced with the backup file, and system access may be temporarily interrupted.
